title: Visceral Heap Fix
description: Fixes the tendon generation in BOP's Visceral Heap biome from becoming "dashed" or disconnected when paired with mods that increase the Nether height.
body: ## Due to a lack of time, I am no longer updating this mod ## **The Issue** If you install [Biomes O' Plenty](https://modrinth.com/mod/biomes-o-plenty/versions), along with a mod that increases the Nether's height like [Incendium](https://modrinth.com/datapack/incendium) or [Amplified Nether](https://modrinth.com/datapack/amplified-nether), you'll notice that if a Visceral Heap biome spawns close to the floor, some of the tendons it generates will either get cut off halfway or will get stretched out so much that some blocks aren't placed, leaving a disconnected, and broken shape. ## **The Fix** This mod uses a mixin to slighly change the way these features are generated and attempts to fix the above issues. While this should fix the broken tendons problem, the features can still stop halfway though rare enough to not be a problem. Many settings related to the generation of these features have also been exposed into the config, letting you fine tune them to your liking. I do not recommend this mod if you're not using a mod that increases the Nether height since it is unnecessary and may cause performance issues. ## **Modpack Use** Feel free to include this mod in your own packs. Just don’t expect full support since I don’t mod Minecraft regularly.
